prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VRH50A** 3.0L twin-turbo V8 (originally from the R382/R383 race cars), rebuilt with **JE Pistons 2618-T6 forged slugs** (9.5:1 CR), **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **Carrillo crankshaft** for 1,000+ HP reliability. Pair with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos** (84mm billet wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) and **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** for precise boost control at 2.5 bar (36 psi).

Custom **Nismo 383-spec dry-sump oiling system** with **Moroso 8-quart baffled pan**, **Dailey Engineering 4-stage pump**, and **Mocal oil cooler** (19-row, -10AN fittings) to prevent oil starvation under 3.5G lateral loads. Replace the stock **VRH50A** timing chain with a **JUN billet timing set** and **Tomei 272° camshafts** (12.5mm lift, 114° LSA) for optimized powerband above 8,000 RPM.

Full **Nismo R383 race-spec drivetrain** overhaul: **OS Giken 4.875:1 LSD** with **Nissan Competition carbon clutch** (3-disc, 240mm), **Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox** (6-speed, paddle-shift actuated), and **Nismo R383-spec driveshafts** (300M steel, 1350-series U-joints). Cooling via **Setrab 50-row oil cooler** (for transmission) and **PWR 4-core aluminum radiator** with **SPAL 16" puller fans**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny R383 Widebody Kit** (Pandem Designs), featuring **carbon-fiber fenders** (3.5" wider front, 4.2" wider rear), **aluminum overfenders** (riveted, Group C-inspired), and **custom 3D-printed ABS diffuser** (with integrated **AIM MXS Strada** LED shift lights). Paint: **Nismo Heritage Green** (M3M) with **3M Matte Black 1080 wrap** on the roof and pillars.

**Nismo R383 GT1-style aero package**: **Voltex Type-5 rear wing** (carbon, 1,800mm span, 300mm chord) with **adjustable Gurney flaps** (0-15mm), **custom front splitter** (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, 120mm overhang) with **DTM-style dive planes**, and **NACA ducts** (for brake cooling) integrated into the **Rocket Bunny side skirts**. Underbody: **Full-length carbon diffuser** (with **Vortex Generators**) and **flat floor pan** (aluminum, 3mm thick).

**Interior: Nismo R383 Endurance Race Spec** – **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (carbon-Kevlar, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **Nismo R383 steering wheel** (D-shaped, Alcantara, 320mm diameter) with **Motec C127 dash display**, and **custom roll cage** (T45 steel, 6-point, **Nismo R383 homologated design**) with **carbon-fiber door cards** (integrated **AIM Solo 2 DL** data logger). Shift knob: **TWM R383 billet sequential** (aluminum, quick-release).
